business.type_label: fractional-CFO / financial advisory firm (builds a financial operating system for $5M+ businesses)
business.geography_hint: US (Duke Fuqua, Ernst & Young, KKR background; USD financials, Google reviews)

engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is deciding whether to trust a firm/person with their business finances — decision rests on founder credentials (Steve Coughran: started a business at 16, CPA/MBA Duke Fuqua, E&Y, KKR), a named process (build a financial OS in 30 days), testimonials and case studies. Sells defined expertise, first rung of the ladder.

goal.one_action: book a free 20-minute financial-review call (secondary: take the free Business Health Check)

structure.archetype_note: Consultancy content-hub: home + founder/why + proof (customers) + lead-gen funnel (schedule-your-call) + supporting content (tools calculators, workshops). Nav lists ~10 items incl. Articles, Videos, Books, Client Portal (mycoltivar.com) not crawled under 6-page cap.

mapped.observed_as: We show you where your money is. And how to make more of it.
Revenue is up. Cash is tight. Why?
Free to start. Clear from day one.
What clients find when they finally see their numbers.
The 3 numbers that tell you if your business is in trouble. (video teaser)
The podcast for owners who want to understand their numbers. (200+ eps, 1.3M+ downloads)
The cash is there. Let us show you where.
newsletter capture — free digital copy of book Cash Flow
I started a business at 16. I know what it feels like to run blind. (Steve Coughran bio)
We do not advise. We build systems. (done-for-you OS in 30 days)
Our Results Speak for Themselves (4 case-study cards)
Financial Health Check sample metrics + Google 4.9/5 badge + $33B/$203M client stats
Common questions about the call. (5-item accordion on /schedule-your-call)
Choose a time that works for you. (embedded scheduling widget)
large resource menu (Articles, Benchmarks, Calculators, Podcast, Store, Videos...)

unmapped.observed: Business Calculators — 13 interactive financial calculators (job costing, margin, cash-flow) on /tools
unmapped.why_no_fit: Interactive computational tools producing user-specific outputs; not a static persuasion section — no canonical id or block models live calculators.

unmapped.observed: Podcast promotion + external podcast.coltivar.com hub (200+ eps, 1.3M downloads, Spotify/Apple embeds)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A recurring media property used as authority/lead magnet; socialProof captures the stats but not the media-hub function (episode list, platform subscribe).

unmapped.observed: Financial Health Check quiz funnel (/financial-check, /check) — a separate scored assessment path
unmapped.why_no_fit: A distinct interactive assessment conversion parallel to the booking funnel; no section/capability models a self-assessment quiz.
unmapped.closest: cta (only the entry button is expressible)

proposed_new.name: interactive-calculators
proposed_new.evidence: /tools lists 13 named financial calculators described as interactive tools to 'understand your numbers, close performance gaps, and drive business value'. RE-CONFIRMED against fuller capture — genuine gap, not shoehornable into the closed vocab.

proposed_new.name: media-hub
proposed_new.evidence: Podcast property (200+ episodes, 1.3M+ downloads) on external subdomain + YouTube channel, plus footer Articles/Videos/Books/Benchmarks, used as top-of-funnel authority. RE-CONFIRMED as gap (generalized from prior 'podcast/media-hub').

design_style.none_fits_because: design_hints empty in capture (no fonts/colors), but content register — CPA/finance credentials, $33B stats, sober metric dashboards — reads authority/professional; pick inferred from copy tone, not visual data.

confidence.why: Capture is 'rendered' (not 'full') and covers 6 of ~10 nav pages — /financial-check quiz, Client Portal, Articles/Videos/Books uncrawled. Founder bio (/about) and booking funnel (/schedule-your-call) now render fully, resolving prior blind spots; engine and goal are clear. Capped at medium per fetch_quality + partial-crawl rule.

gap_findings: interactive-calculators: 13 live financial calculators (/tools) have no section or capability representation — RE-CONFIRMED as real gap after fuller capture.
media-hub: podcast (200+ eps, external subdomain) + YouTube used as authority/lead-gen; socialProof stats capture the numbers but not the media-property function.

Scheduling widget on /schedule-your-call is a simple embedded 'pick a time' calendar (Kajabi/Calendly-style single-step booking) — NOT the multi-step 'booking-wizard' proposed by priscillawolf: no inventory, service-selection, or multi-page flow. It behaves as leadForm + calendar embed; treat as delegated form, do not force a booking-wizard match.

Multi-funnel strain RE-ASSESSED with fuller capture: site runs 3+ parallel conversion paths (book-a-call, financial-health-check quiz, newsletter capture) plus a client portal. The one_action model still resolves cleanly to 'book a call' as primary, so this is mild strain, NOT a breakage — the health-check QUIZ is the one genuinely separate scored-assessment conversion the model cannot express.

Content-marketing hub scope (calculators, podcast, articles, videos, books, benchmarks) exceeds single-landing-page assumptions; a consultancy at this maturity needs a hub/resource-library structure beyond the section list.
